python3 -c "
[?2004l[?2004himport json
[?2004l[?2004hwith open('build/test/task2/functional-1/011_add.sysu.c/answer.json') as f:
[?2004l[?2004h    d = json.load(f)
[?2004l[?2004h# Find BinaryOperator nodes
[?2004l[?2004hdef find_binary(obj, depth=0):
[?2004l[?2004h    if isinstance(obj, dict):
[?2004l[?2004h        if obj.get('kind') == 'BinaryOperator':
[?2004l[?2004h            print(f\"Depth {depth}: opcode={obj.get('opcode')}\")
[?2004l[?2004h        for v in obj.values():
[?2004l[?2004h            find_binary(v, depth+1)
[?2004l[?2004h    elif isinstance(obj, list):
[?2004l[?2004h        for v in obj:
[?2004l[?2004h            find_binary(v, depth)
[?2004l[?2004hfind_binary(d)
[?2004l[?2004h"
[?2004lDepth 3: opcode==
Depth 3: opcode==
Depth 4: opcode=+
[?2004h
